25.reason: [This condition is redundant and incorrect; it should be 'else if(op == -1)' or simply 'else' to break on -1. Because of this, the loop never breaks when op is -1, causing infinite loop or undefined behavior.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [This condition is redundant and incorrect; it should be 'else if(op == -1)' or simply 'else' to break on -1. Because of this, the loop never breaks when op is -1, causing infinite loop or undefined behavior.]
